message.content:
The user wants to remove two sections from their cc-statusline (at `/Users/saurabhtyagi/cc-statusline/`):
1. The timer display: `11:46AM/3PM (4h 13m)` — this is the SHOW_TIMER section
2. The token rate: `1.9k/min` — this is the SHOW_TOKEN_RATE section

Please disable both by setting `show_timer` and `show_token_rate` to `false` in `/Users/saurabhtyagi/cc-statusline/config/config.json`. Make only that change.

content.text: Let me read the config file first.

content.text:
Done. In `/Users/saurabhtyagi/cc-statusline/config/config.json`, lines 103 and 104 now read:

- `"show_timer": false`
- `"show_token_rate": false`

No other settings were touched. The timer display and token burn rate will no longer appear in the status line.

If you want to make further changes to the status line, you can ask Claude to update it — the statusline-setup agent should be used for any future status line configuration changes.
